pick_implementation.title: Pick the Tesla developer-app credential set
pick_implementation.description: Choose existing application credentials or add new ones. Add the same client_id / client_secret you registered for `tesla_fleet` — each integration goes through OAuth independently and gets its own refresh token, so they no longer rotate over each other.

vehicle.title: Select vehicle
vehicle.description: Choose the VIN this integration should track.

endpoint.title: Telemetry endpoint
endpoint.description:
Configure how Tesla reaches Home Assistant. The hostname must resolve publicly and present a TLS cert valid for the chain you'll put in `fleet_telemetry_config.ca`. The proxy secret is what nginx will inject as `X-Tesla-Proxy-Secret` on every forwarded request — copy it into your nginx config.

The partner private key is the EC P-256 (secp256r1) key whose public counterpart is hosted at `https://<partner-domain>/.well-known/appspecific/com.tesla.3p.public-key.pem`. If you don't have one yet, generate it with `openssl ecparam -genkey -name prime256v1 -noout -out partner.key` and paste the file contents below.

error.vin_not_found: That VIN is not on this account.
error.bad_key: Could not parse the private key. It must be a PEM-encoded private key.
error.wrong_curve: The key must be EC P-256 (curve secp256r1).

abort.missing_credentials: No application credentials configured. Add them via Settings → Devices & Services → Application Credentials.
abort.missing_configuration: Application credentials are missing. Add them and try again.
abort.no_url_available: No URL available for the OAuth callback. Configure an external URL or my.home-assistant.io.
abort.authorize_url_timeout: Timed out generating the authorize URL.
abort.authorize_url_fail: Could not generate the authorize URL.
abort.oauth_failed: Could not complete the OAuth flow.
abort.oauth_timeout: Timed out completing the OAuth flow.
abort.oauth_unauthorized: Tesla rejected the OAuth flow — the developer app may not be approved for the requested scopes.
abort.no_vehicles: Tesla returned no vehicles for this account.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach Tesla. Check network connectivity and try again.
